title: cologania parviflora
intro: Cologania parviflora, also known as the small-flowered cologania, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Cologania parviflora is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal use.
